meetings.name: Community Advisory Committee (CAC)

meetings.name: Transportation Professionals Advisory Committee (TPAC)
meetings.schedule: 2nd Thursday of every other month (January, March, May, July, September, November)

community_meetings.description: Public community meetings held periodically for rider input

how_to_participate.description: The public can attend Board and CAC meetings, provide public comment, or share thoughts through other channels.
options: Attend in person at Access Services headquarters
Join virtually via Zoom (links posted with agendas on accessla.org)
Submit written comments via Contact Us page at accessla.org
Call Customer Service at 800-827-0829 (Monday through Friday, 8 AM to 5 PM)
Call InfoLine at 213-270-6110 for meeting schedule updates
